name: W-12 agent documents all four grounding sources (manifest §2.8 ADR W-4 eval P-2 test suite)
command: grep -q '§2.8' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && grep -q 'W-4' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && grep -q 'P-2' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && grep -qi 'test suite\|test path' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/agents/pr-review-conversational.md" && echo cited 1>&2
